workplan: Design all 8 KhidmatAI screens using StitchMCP before any Flutter code is written. Steps: (1) Create StitchMCP project named KhidmatAI for mobile. (2) Configure design system with exact color tokens: Primary #1B5E20, Secondary #2E7D32, Accent #FFC107, Background #F5F5F5, Error #D32F2F, Success #388E3C, 12px corner radius, 16-24px spacing, Inter/Roboto sans-serif. (3) Generate all 8 screens in Stitch: HomeScreen, ProvidersScreen, ProviderDetailScreen, BookingConfirmationScreen, FollowUpScreen, AgentTraceScreen, DisputeScreen, BaselineCompareScreen. (4) Save design_tokens.json and 8 screen JSON files to mobile/design/. (5) Save 24_ui_design_phase.json artifact.
decisions_made: Use StitchMCP for all screen designs before any Flutter code
Bilingual English and Urdu with equal visual weight on every screen
Primary green #1B5E20 palette with amber #FFC107 accent
Card-based layout with 12px corner radius throughout
Bottom sheet for confirmations not new screens
Horizontal chip rows for service categories and availability slots
Colored left-border cards for AgentTraceScreen by agent type
Bottom navigation bar: Home, Providers, AI Trace, Compare
No Flutter code until all 8 designs are approved
outcome: Plan approved by user. Executing StitchMCP design phase now.
